svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(254, 240, 188), rgb(44, 32, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(154, 111, 0), rgb(177, 140, 45));

box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #9a6f00;
